title: Agent Manifest
description: Schema for Agent manifest files (kind: Agent). Defines a single agent's model, design pattern, tools, skills, memory, and context configuration.

apiVersion.description: API version of the manifest format.

kind.description: Resource kind. Must be 'Agent' for an agent manifest.

name.description: Unique identifier for the agent. Used in MAS workflow routing and telemetry.

version.description: Semantic version of this agent definition.

description.description: Human-readable description of the agent's purpose.

AgentSpec.description: Core specification of the agent: model, design pattern, tools, skills, memory, and context.

models.description: LLM model configurations for this agent. The first entry (or the one with id 'main') is the primary model.

tools.description: Tools available to this agent. Each item is either a string tool ID (resolved from tool providers) or an object with ref/module details.

skills.description: List of skill names the agent can consult. Skills inject domain knowledge into the system prompt and are queryable via consult_skills.

memory.description: Memory type or configuration. String shorthand: 'semantic' (ephemeral in-memory), 'semantic-persistent' (SQLite cross-session), 'episodic', etc.

description.description: Routing-facing one-liner for delegation tools and AgentCard. Not injected into the LLM system prompt.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens in the model response.

DesignPattern.description: The agent's reasoning/execution loop pattern. Determines how the agent iterates on tasks.

DesignPatternConfig.description: Configuration parameters for the design pattern.

max_steps.description: Maximum number of reasoning/action iterations (ReAct steps) before the agent must produce a final answer.

oneOf.description: Tool ID resolved from registered tool providers (e.g., 'web-search', 'calculator', 'memory-search').
Tool reference or inline tool definition.

ref.description: Path to an external tool definition file (JSON or YAML).

module_path.description: Python module path for the tool class (e.g., 'agent_runtime.tools.calculator_tool').

class_name.description: Python class name within the module.

priority.description: Tool priority for ordering in the tool list.

AgentContext.description: Structured context blocks that are assembled into the agent's system prompt.

intent.description: Brief statement of the agent's purpose (injected at the top of the system prompt).

tool_usage.description: Instructions on when and how to use available tools.

memory_usage.description: Instructions on how to use long-term memory (read, store, prioritize).

ContextManager.description: Context manager configuration for runtime prompt assembly.

skills.description: Skills to inject into context at runtime.

MemoryConfig.description: Detailed memory configuration (when string shorthand is insufficient).

path.description: File path for persistent memory stores.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time in seconds before the agent is terminated.

max_retries.description: Number of retries on transient failures.
